posts.text:
BREAKING: President Trump says the Iran War was a "test" for NATO and he is "so disappointed in NATO."

"Remember my statements in a number of months from now... never forget," Trump says.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text:
Does your broker make more money from YOU investing in what they recommend then they make investing in their own recommendations?

Best find a broker that’s a great investor.  Not just a great salesperson.
posts.author: BambroughKevin
